task.title: Resolve Broken References
task.shortdesc: Identify and correct broken internal references so execution output remains navigable and complete.

prereq.p: Run discovery and generate an execution report from dry-run or apply mode.

step.cmd: Check discovery-level missing reference counts in execution report.
Inspect relationship edges for unresolved targets.
Fix source paths, map topicrefs, or media paths in the package or plugin routing rules.

info.p: Keep path normalization deterministic. Do not rely on runtime fallback guesses.

step.cmd: Regenerate discovery and re-run dry-run execution to verify counts.

info.codeblock: python3 -m dita_package_processor discover --package /path/to/package --output build/discovery.json python3 -m dita_package_processor execute --plan build/plan.json --source-root /path/to/package --output build/target --report build/execution-report.json

result.p: Internal links and media references resolve cleanly in the migrated output package.
result.codeblock: execution-report.json discovery fields trend toward: missing_references: 0 external_references: expected value for your policy
